assertion_results.text: Response provides a hook named useGoogleAuth (exact name)
assertion_results.evidence: Hook named `useGoogleOAuth` — not `useGoogleAuth`. ARE-incompatible. Importing this hook requires a different import path.

assertion_results.text: Response includes a getToken() function that attempts silent refresh before showing consent popup
assertion_results.evidence: `getAuthToken()` returns the in-memory state variable — no refresh logic at all. No `prompt: 'none'` silent refresh. If token expires, user must call signIn() again manually.

assertion_results.text: Response stores token in sessionStorage using keys g_token and g_expiry (exact key names)
assertion_results.evidence: Uses `localStorage.setItem('google_token', …)` — wrong storage type (localStorage vs sessionStorage) and wrong key name ('google_token' vs 'g_token'). Expiry not stored at all.

assertion_results.text: Response includes a connect() function that fetches profile from googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo
assertion_results.evidence: Function named `signIn()` (not connect()). Profile URL is `googleapis.com/userinfo/v2/me` (v2 endpoint) not `googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo` (v3 endpoint) — different response shape (id vs sub field).
